scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend --if-present && npm run lint -w frontend --if-present
scripts.db:migrate: npm -w backend exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: npm -w backend exec prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: npm -w backend exec prisma db seed
